task.title: Align spawn options docs with relay startup options

events.content: Split spawn docs into relay startup options and per-agent options: Split spawn docs into relay startup options and per-agent options

raw.question: Split spawn docs into relay startup options and per-agent options
raw.chosen: Split spawn docs into relay startup options and per-agent options
raw.reasoning: The user-facing page was mixing broker/client startup configuration with per-agent spawn fields. Breaking them apart lets the TypeScript/Python language toggle show the correct API names for each surface and keeps the markdown export accurate.

retrospective.summary: Updated spawning docs to separate relay startup options from per-agent options, switched the language-aware table to show the requested TypeScript broker/client fields, and fixed markdown export/tests for the new startup variant.
